overnight.name: Reykjavík Area
overnight.notes: Stay near Reykjavík. Large campsite with facilities.

stops.name: Keflavík International Airport
stops.notes: Pick up rental car. Get SIM card. Fuel up before leaving.

stops.name: Bonus Supermarket, Reykjavík
stops.notes: Iceland's cheapest grocery chain. Stock up on camping supplies, food for the week.

stops.name: Reykjavík Old Harbour
stops.notes: Walk the harbour, grab a famous Icelandic hot dog. Easy intro to the city.

overnight.name: Hverageri Area Campsite
overnight.notes: Geothermal town campsite. Good base for hot spring hikes.

stops.name: Þingvellir National Park
stops.notes: Walk between two tectonic plates. UNESCO World Heritage Site. About 1-2 hours exploring.

stops.name: Geysir Geothermal Area
stops.notes: Strokkur erupts every 5-10 minutes. About 30 min from Þingvellir.

stops.name: Gullfoss Waterfall
stops.notes: Two-tiered massive waterfall. Very close to Geysir, just a few minutes drive.

stops.name: Hverageri Hot Springs
stops.notes: Geothermal town. Optional: Reykjadalur hot river hike (3km each way).

overnight.name: Skaftafell Campsite
overnight.notes: Large campsite in Vatnajökull National Park. Bring camp stove. Arrive by 2pm.

stops.name: Seljalandsfoss Waterfall
stops.notes: Walk BEHIND the waterfall. Bring rain gear. About 1.5 hours from Hverageri.

stops.name: Skógafoss Waterfall
stops.notes: 60m drop. Climb 370 stairs to the top. About 30 min from Seljalandsfoss.

stops.name: Reynisfjara Black Sand Beach
stops.notes: Dramatic basalt columns, sea stacks. NEVER turn your back on the ocean - dangerous waves!

stops.name: Skaftafell — Svartifoss Hike
stops.notes: 3.8km round trip to Svartifoss waterfall with hexagonal basalt columns. About 2 hours from Vík.

overnight.name: Jökulsárlón Area / Höfn
overnight.notes: Town campsite in Höfn. Great showers, kitchen. Walking distance to lobster restaurants.

stops.name: Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon
stops.notes: Iconic glacier lagoon with blue icebergs. Boat tours available (~6,500 ISK). About 1.5-2 hours to explore. Very close to campsite, about 1 hour.

stops.name: Diamond Beach
stops.notes: Icebergs on black sand beach. Just across the bridge from Jökulsárlón. Magical at golden hour.

overnight.name: South Coast Campsite
overnight.notes: Small quiet campsite. Good location between east and west.

stops.name: Fjallsárlón Glacier Lagoon
stops.notes: Smaller, quieter glacier lagoon. Fewer tourists. Great views of Vatnajökull.

stops.name: Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon
stops.notes: Stunning canyon up to 100m deep. 2km rim walk. Made famous by Justin Bieber. About 1.5-2 hours from glacier. May need permit in summer.

overnight.name: Landmannalaugar or nearby
overnight.notes: Highland campsite if accessible (4WD required). Otherwise stay on Ring Road route.

stops.name: Hiking/Exploration Day
stops.notes: Dedicated hiking day. Options: Landmannalaugar (if 4WD), or alternative hikes along south coast. About 2 hours drive.

overnight.name: Snæfellsnes Peninsula Campsite
overnight.notes: West Iceland peninsula campsite. Great coastal views.

stops.name: Drive to Snæfellsnes Peninsula
stops.notes: Long drive to west coast peninsula. About 3 hours. Known as 'Iceland in miniature'.

stops.name: Kirkjufell Mountain
stops.notes: Iceland's most photographed mountain. Short walk to viewpoint.

overnight.name: Reykjavík Campsite
overnight.notes: Back to Reykjavík. Final night before departure.

stops.name: Snæfellsnes Exploration
stops.notes: Morning exploration of peninsula. Beaches, lava fields, fishing villages.

stops.name: Return to Reykjavík
stops.notes: Drive back to capital. About 2 hours. Optional stops at coastal towns on the way.

stops.name: Blue Lagoon (optional)
stops.notes: Book 6+ weeks in advance. Comfort package ~60 USD. Perfect final day before flight. About 50 min from Reykjavík.

stops.name: Keflavík Airport — Car Return
stops.notes: Return car 2-3 hrs before departure. Fill tank before returning!
